summary: Good-quality recording of a fun, party‑style July ’89 Alpine show featuring rare Sugar Begonia and a Sunshine Daydream closer.
review: The review praises this Alpine show as a sunny, party‑Dead experience with standout performances of the rare "Sugar Begonia" and a beautiful "Sunshine Daydream" closer, plus a strong rendition of "Eyes." While no specific details about the recording source are given, the overall vibe suggests an enjoyable listen despite lacking technical commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one positive 4‑star review; shows strong musical appreciation but no recording details, so rating is based primarily on show enthusiasm.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not mention soundboard, audience mix, or clarity; no explicit audio quality comments provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a party‑Dead, sunny summer‑day set that leans toward fun over deep jams, with a strong closing sequence.
